name: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business Organization Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. (the Company) was originally incorporated on February 27, 2014, in the state of Nevada as Tech Foundry Ventures. On July 8, 2016, the Company changed its name to Nevada Canyon Gold Corp., in order to reflect its current business and strategy. We are a US-based natural resource company headquartered in Reno, Nevada. The Company has a large, strategic land position and royalties, in multiple projects, within some of Nevad...
